description: Hermes Agent is an open-source agent framework from Nous Research that works with any OpenAI-compatible provider — Nous Portal, OpenRouter, Anthropic, GitHub Copilot, z.ai, Kimi, MiniMax, DeepSeek, Hugging Face, Google, or your own self-hosted ...
title: Hermes Agent v0.16 Reference: Surface Release + Desktop App + Admin Panel
